CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO BOB GLIDDEN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUL-20-2011 AT 1:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARKOFF STRUCTURAL PEST CONTROL CO., INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAM, ALICE $2,882.50 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,332.50, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST BOB GLIDDEN (PRESIDENT-HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION) IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT LAM, ALICE
